title: Spoiled Fridge
description: An addon for the Spoiled mod that adds a fridge to the game.
body:
An addon that adds a refrigerator to the game that has 15 slots, each of which holds 16 items.

To make the fridge work, add **"fridge:fridge,0.5"** to **containerModifier** in the mod config. You can set it to any value you want. (I recommend setting the spoilrate to 0.5).

The mod can be used separately from Spoiled, but it will not have any functionality.

# FAQ
1. **Can I use it in modpacks?**
Yeah, that's what it's designed for.

2. **Backports?**
No. For 1.16.5 you can check out the [Spoiled Add-on](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spoiled-add-on) mod.

3. **Update to newer version?**
When MCreator updates.
